creator: alfredo@freebsd.org
text:
I got a Power Mac G5 Model A1047 and tried the patches in attached to this bug and nothing changes, it still unstable.

As information, "git checkout 6c346639ba986a285e456099bc2faf1fe17954df" seems run OK on my G5. Next commits are unstable but I don't see any reason by looking at the code changes.
